style_guide: Painted kid-friendly spy adventure, readable Pattern Temple objects, no text inside generated images.

assets.prompt: A bright jungle stone temple courtyard with a carved pattern wall, bench-sized shape tiles, small number stones, small sequence tablets, floor star mosaic, open lower foreground, and a clear temple gate exit on the right; no floating props or oversized clue objects.
Transparent-background prop atlas for Pattern Temple: pattern wall tablet, shape tiles, number stones, sequence cards, and glowing temple gate marker; no readable text.

assets.decision: Reuse the established Agent Alex spritesheet for campaign continuity.
Reuse the established Agent Alex portrait sheet for dialogue expressions.
Reuse the polished existing guide spritesheet until a dedicated Keeper Maya sheet can match the same quality and walk-cycle constraints.

integration_note: Level 08 now uses an embedded-prop Pattern Temple background for all world objects. The transparent prop atlas remains referenced only for inventory reward icons; scene hotspots and the temple gate are represented by painted background art.
